info.title: Giving Module
info.description: This module is designed to help manage the donations you receive and the givers who gave them. The Giving module also includes support for claiming Gift Aid (for UK customers only) and Tax Deductible donations (North America).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the custom field to retrieve.

get.description: Retrieve a single custom field identified by ID.
Returns a list of custom fields
Returns a list of donations, sorted by the most recent first.

parameters.name: claim_ids[]
parameters.description: Filter records to those matching values in the provided array. This filter uses the logical OR operator.

parameters.description: Filter records with a fuzzy string match against the following properties: cheque_number, method, fund_name, giver_reference, giver_first_name, giver_last_name.

CustomField.description: A Custom Field, as found in several modules

id.description: The ID of the Custom Field.

help.description: Some text to help explain the purpose of the field.
help.example: Tick if you would like to receive the weekly newsletter or not.

options.description: Field types checkbox, radio or select - will contain options for the field

name.example: Yes I would love to receive the newsletter!

required.description: Whether the field is required or not.

settings.description: Settings relating to My, Embed and Connect.

my.description: My ChurchSuite and My Consent settings.

editable.description: Whether the field is editable in My.

viewable.description: Whether the field is viewable in My.

required.description: Whether the field is a required in My.

editable.description: Whether the field is editable in Embed.

viewable.description: Whether the field is viewable in Embed.

required.description: Whether the field is required in Embed.

editable.description: Whether the field is editable in Connect.

viewable.description: Whether the field is viewable in Connect.

required.description: Whether the field is required in Connect.

created_at.description: Date and time the Custom Field was created.

created_by.description: The user who created the Custom Field.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Custom Field was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user who last modified the Custom Field.

batch_id.description: The ID of the Batch the Donation is linked to, or null if it isn't linked one.

giver_id.description: The ID of the Giver the Donation is linked to.

fund_id.description: The ID of the Fund the Donation is linked to.

pledge_id.description: The ID of the Pledge the Donation is linked to, or null if it isn't linked one.

claim_id.description: The ID of the Claim the Donation is linked to, or null if it isn't linked to one, or if the account is not in the UK.

amount.description: The Donation amount, in the smallest unit of the account currency.

method.description: The method through which the Donation was made. Value must be either system-defined or a user-defined value from the module settings.

cheque_number.description: When method is cheque, the cheque number associated with the Donation.

giftaid.description: The Gift Aid details of the Donation, or null if the account is not in the UK.

percentage_giver.description: The percentage of Gift Aid contribution for the Giver, or null if the Giver is not a couple.

percentage_spouse.description: The percentage of Gift Aid contribution for the Giver's spouse, or null if the Giver is not a couple.

claimable_amount.description: The amount of Gift Aid that is claimable for this Donation, in the smallest unit of the account currency, or null if the Giver does not have a declaration or overrode the declaration.

claimed_amount.description: The amount of Gift Aid that has been claimed for this Donation, in the smallest unit of the account currency, or null if the Donation has not had Gift Aid claimed on it.

refund_claim_id.description: The ID of the Claim the Donation's refunded Gift Aid has been processed in if the Gift Aid has been refunded, or null if the Gift Aid has not been refunded.

refund_amount.description: The amount of Gift Aid that has been refunded for this Donation, in the smallest unit of the account currency, or null if the Gift Aid has not been refunded.

overridden.description: Indicates when Gift Aid has been overridden for the Donation. When true, the Donation should not be subject to Gift Aid, even when a covering declaration exists.

tax_deductible.description: Whether the Donation is tax deductible. Null for accounts outside of AU, CA, HK and US.

gateway.description: For donations processed through a payment gateway, null if a payment gateway has not been used.

service.description: The payment gateway used for the Donation.

status.description: The last reported status for the Donation, as reported by the payment gateway.

payout_id.description: The payment gateway's payout ID for the Donation, null if the Donation has not been paid out.

fees.description: The total amount of fees for the Donation, in the smallest unit of the account currency.

paid_out_at.description: Date and time the payment gateway reported the Donation was paid out.

modified_at.description: Date and time the payment gateway last reported a change to the Donation.

status.description: The current status of the Donation.

created_at.description: Date and time the Donation was created.

created_by.description: The user who created the Donation.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Donation was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user who last modified the Donation.

Flow.description: Flow data, as found in several modules.

notification_days.description: The days of the week where the Flow's managers receive emails when actions in this Flow are due/overdue, or null if no notification days are set.

visible_in.description: Modules the resource is visible in.

status.description: The current status of the Flow.

archived_at.description: Date and time the Flow was archived.

created_at.description: Date and time the Flow was created.

created_by.description: The user that created the Flow.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Flow was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user that last modified the Flow.

identifier.description: The unique identifier for the Fund.

brand_id.description: The Brand ID linked to the Fund.

visible_in_donate.description: Whether the Fund is shown in Donate or not.

visible_in_tap_to_donate.description: Whether the Fund is shown in Tap to Donate or not.

tap_to_donate_amounts.description: The preset amounts available for this fund within the Tap to Donate app.

gift_aid.description: Whether Gift Aid can be claimed on this Fund, or null if your account cannot have Gift Aid applied to it.

tax_deductible.description: Whether this Fund is tax deductible, or null if your accounts country does not have tax deductible giving.

sender_email.description: The sender's email address for the confirmation email.

sender_name.description: The sender's name for the confirmation email.

subject.description: The subject for the confirmation email.

body.description: The html body for the confirmation email.

description.example: This fund is for regular giving to the church in all areas.

order.description: The position of the Fund when ordered.

status.description: The current status of the Fund.

image.description: A collection of different sized variations of an Image.

thumbnail.description: The thumbnail Image url. Thumbnail images are 128x128px.

uploaded_at.description: Date and time the Image was uploaded at.

archived_at.description: Date and time the Fund was archived.

created_at.description: Date and time the Fund was created.

created_by.description: The user who created the Fund.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Fund was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user who last modified the Fund.

contact_id.description: The Contact ID, if the Giver is linked to a Contact.

reference.description: The unique reference identifier for the Giver.

bank_references.description: An array of bank references for the Giver.

mobile.description: The mobile number of the Giver.

email.description: The email address of the Giver.

telephone.description: The phone number of the Giver.

is_couple.description: Whether the Giver is a couple or not.

spouse_first_name.description: The spouse's first name, null if the giver is not a couple.

spouse_last_name.description: The spouse's last name, null if the giver is not a couple.

giftaid_percentage_giver.description: The percentage of giftaid contribution for the Giver, or null if the giver is not a couple or the account is not in the UK.

giftaid_percentage_spouse.description: The percentage of giftaid contribution for the Giver's spouse, or null if the giver is not a couple or the account is not in the UK.

first_donation_date.description: The date of the Give's first donation or null if no donations have been made.

last_donation_date.description: The date of the Give's last donation or null if no donations have been made.

site_ids.description: The Giver's site ID returned in a single item array.

line_1.description: The first line of the Address

line_2.description: The second line of the Address

line_3.description: The third line of the Address

country.description: The country of the Address, in ISO3166 alpha 2 format

latitude.description: The latitude of the Address, to 6 decimal places

longitude.description: The longitude of the Address, to 6 decimal places

custom_fields.description: Custom Field responses for this resource

items.description: Custom Field responses for this resource

id.description: The ID of the Custom Field

field_type.description: A discriminator to determine the type of Custom Field this response belongs to.

oneOf.description: The raw value of a text, textarea, email, phone or date.
The UUID of the selected response for a radio or select field.
An array of objects which contains the UUIDs of the selected responses for a checkbox field. If no checkboxes are selected an empty array will be returned.

items.description: The UUID of the selected response for a radio or select field.

archived_at.description: Date and time the Giver's record was archived.

created_at.description: Date and time the Giver's record was created.

created_by.description: The user who created the Giver's record.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Giver's record was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user who last modified the Giver's record.

Note.description: A single Note, as found in multiple modules.

content.example: Had a conversation about this on 12th of July.

pinned.description: Whether the Note has been pinned.

created_at.description: Date and time the Note was created.

created_by.description: The user that created the Note.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Note was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user that last modified the Note.

content.example: Had a conversation about this on 12th of July.

pinned.description: Whether the Note should be pinned.

num_results.description: The total number of results available

per_page.description: The requested number of results per page

next_page.description: The page number of the next page of results, if there is one

prev_page.description: The page number of the previous page of results, if there is one

giver_id.description: The Giver ID the Pledge is linked to.

fund_id.description: The Fund ID the Pledge is linked to.

amount_recurring.description: The Pledge's recurring amount in the smallest monetary unit of your account's currency.

amount_oneoff.description: The Pledge's one off amount in the smallest monetary unit of your account's currency.

cancelled_at.description: Date and time the Pledge was cancelled.

cancelled_by.description: The user who cancelled the Pledge.

status.description: The current status of the Pledge.

created_at.description: Date and time the Pledge's record was created.

created_by.description: The user who created the Pledge's record.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Pledge's record was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user who last modified the Pledge's record.

Tag.description: Tag data as found in several modules.

description.example: A individual who is serving for the church.

colour.description: The name of the colour of the Tag.

is_smart.description: Whether the Tag is smart or fixed.

visible_to.description: Who the resource is visible to, or null if there are no restrictions.

just_me.description: Whether the resource is visible to just the current user or not.

user_group_ids.description: List of user group IDs the resource is visible to.

pinned_icon.description: This Tag's pinned icon. Pinned tags give you a quick way to see your most important tags at a glance; they're displayed at the top of the page when viewing a person's profile.

created_at.description: Date and time the Tag was created.

created_by.description: The user that created the Tag.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Tag was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user that last modified the Tag.

category_id.description: The Tag's Category ID. This sets the default colour of the Tag to the Category's colour.

description.example: The Kings Hope staff team (paid and unpaid).

colour.description: The name of the colour of the Tag. If not specified, the Category colour will be used where applicable, falling back to 'blue'.

is_smart.description: Whether the Tag is smart or fixed.

oneOf.description: Who the resource is visible to. Do not include in the request if there are no restrictions. If included in the request, only one of `just_me` or `user_group_ids` can be set.

just_me.description: The resource should only be visible to the current user

oneOf.description: Who the resource is visible to, or null if there are no restrictions.

user_group_ids.description: List of user group IDs the resource is visible to. You are only able to add user group IDs for user groups you have access to.

pinned_icon.description: Pin this Tag by specifying an icon. Pinned tags give you a quick way to see your most important tags at a glance; they're displayed at the top of the page when viewing a person's profile.

TagCategory.description: Tag category data as found in several modules

color.description: The name of the colour of the tag category

description.example: The Kings Hope staff team (paid and unpaid).

colour.description: The name of the colour of the Tag.

visible_to.description: Who the resource is visible to. Null if there are no restrictions. If `just_me` is true, `user_group_ids` must be empty or not set. If `just_me` is false, `user_group_ids` must contain at least one User Group ID.

just_me.description: The resource should only be visible to the current user

user_group_ids.description: List of user group IDs the resource is visible to.

just_me.description: The resource should only be visible to the current user

user_group_ids.description: List of user group IDs the resource is visible to.

pinned_icon.description: Pin this Tag by specifying an icon. This will be displayed within the application.

TagResource.description: A Tag Resource represents a Person who is part of a Tag.

person.description: The Person to link to the Tag.

type.description: The Person's type, indicating whether they are a Child, Contact, Customer or Giver.

giver_id.description: This is no longer recommended - please use `person` to get the Person's details. The Giver's ID.

TagResourceAdd.description: Create a Tag Resource, linking a Person to a Tag.

person.description: The Person to link to the Tag.

type.description: The Person's type, indicating whether they are a Child, Contact, Customer or Giver.

example.ticket_id: This ticket_id is invalid for this event.

message.example: There were validation errors with the data you provided.

401.description: Unauthorized - the credentials provided are incorrect or no longer active.

403.description: Forbidden - you do not have permission to access this resource.

message.example: You do not have sufficient permissions for this action

404.description: Not Found - the resource or API endpoint cannot be found.

409.description: Conflict - a conflict exists that prevents your request from being completed.

message.example: Your event cannot be deleted. A sign-up paid through Stripe and cannot be deleted.

429.description: Too Many Requests - the rate limit has been exceeded.

Retry-After.description: Number of seconds until the rate limiting period expires

message.example: The rate limit has been exceeded.
enum: The rate limit has been exceeded.

tags.description: Flows are an incredibly versatile tool designed to streamline repetitive people-processing tasks by breaking them down into manageable stages. For each stage, you define the choice of preset actions to be processed as each person becomes due.
